title: Increase pagination limit for sitemap and admin
description:
Increase the 'per_page' or 'limit' constraint (le=100) to allow larger batches (e.g., le=1000) for products, blog posts, and admin searches to support sitemap generation and internal tools. Check and update the following files:
- backend/app/api/v1/products/router.py (list_products and search_products)
- backend/app/api/v1/blog/router.py (list_posts)
- backend/app/api/v1/admin/router.py (list_products, list_users)
acceptance_criteria: Product list endpoint allows per_page=1000 without 422 error
Product search endpoint allows limit=1000 without 422 error
Blog list endpoint allows limit=1000 without 422 error
Admin list endpoints allow larger per_page values (e.g., 1000)
Local linting and type checking pass (ruff, mypy)
